description_long: This is a compact, single-piece dumbbell with a glossy blue coating, commonly used for fitness and strength training. The handle is cylindrical and smooth, connecting two larger hexagonal end caps that provide stability and prevent rolling. The entire object has a uniform blue color, with no visible logos or weight markings. The surface appears hard and slightly reflective, suggesting a vinyl or neoprene coating over a dense core, likely metal. The dumbbell is in excellent condition, showing no signs of wear, scratches, or damage, and is suitable for use in gyms, parks, or home workout spaces.
description: A glossy blue dumbbell with a smooth cylindrical handle and hexagonal end caps, appearing new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dumbbell, highlighting the cylindrical handle and hexagonal end caps.
description_view_1: End-on view emphasizing the hexagonal shape of the end cap and the glossy blue finish.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the handle and both end caps in profile.
description_view_3: End-on view identical to view 1, focusing on the hexagonal end cap and smooth surface.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, round cross-section, smooth surface, no ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced, matching blue coating, no visible patterns or features.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or damage.
